title: Love Battle
original_title: รัก 2 ปี ยินดีคืนเงิน
overview: Tan, an actuary guy who even calculates the romantic relationship comes up with a new insurance policy called, "Love Insurance" after being hurtfully betrayed by his girlfriend.
